index.designedBy: Designed by Félix I. and Léa C., Marie-Anne High School
index.heroSubTitle: Sivara helps you find information quickly in a clear, immersive, and ad-free experience.
index.categoriesSubTitle: Discover search results organized by topic.
index.accessibleSubTitle: Sivara gathers information from all over the world to present it simply.
index.noWebResultSub: We didn't find anything on the public web. Try other keywords.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Access your secure space.
login.magicLinkSub: Check your inbox to log in with one click.
login.recoverySub: If you lost your password, use your recovery key.
login.disclaimer: Unauthorized access is strictly prohibited and subject to automated monitoring. By logging in, you agree to the Terms of Service.
login.lottieSub: We promise we won't sell your history to ad bots. (Unless they ask nicely... No, just kidding).
login.tempLink: A temporary login link will be sent to

onboarding.title: Create an account
onboarding.subtitle: Join the sovereign digital ecosystem.
onboarding.passwordSub: Use a strong and unique password.
onboarding.recoveryDesc1: This key is the only way to recover your documents if you forget your password.
onboarding.recoveryDesc2: Write it down now. It will never be displayed again.
onboarding.recoveryWarning: If you lose this key AND your password, your encrypted documents will be permanently inaccessible. No one can recover them, not even Sivara.
onboarding.recoveryInput: Type the first 4 characters of your key to confirm:
